text.title: QA Prioritization Rubric Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Triager labels by gut feel; same bug labelled S1 by Alice, S3 by Bob.
antipattern.fix: Require anchor citation in every triage; review weekly disagreements.

antipattern.symptom: Workaround exists in support docs but bug still triaged S1.
antipattern.fix: Reassess; downgrade if workaround documented; record citation.

antipattern.symptom: SLAs printed but no metric tracks them.
antipattern.fix: Add SLA-miss metric to triage dashboard; review breaches weekly.
